# Generated by /analyze-project skill (anonymized for catalog)

# 📊 Session Analysis Report — Example Product Portfolio

**Generated**: 2026-03-14  
**Conversations Analyzed**: 64 substantive  
**Date Range**: Feb 19 – Mar 14, 2026

## Executive Summary

| Metric | Value | Rating |
|:---|:---|:---|
| First-Shot Success Rate | 57% | 🟡 |
| Completion Rate | 81% | 🟢 |
| Avg Scope Growth | +24% | 🟡 |
| Replan Rate | 16% | 🟢 |
| Avg Session Severity | 24 | 🟢 |
| High-Severity Sessions | 7 / 64 | 🟢 |

**Narrative**: Strong velocity and improved completion/replan rates. Dominant issue is still **post-success human scope expansion** (user adds Phase 2 after Phase 1 succeeds). Main fix needed: workflow discipline (session splitting).

## Root Cause Breakdown (non-clean sessions)

| Root Cause | % | Notes |
|:---|:---|:---|
| HUMAN_SCOPE_CHANGE | 40% | Post-success additions |
| LEGITIMATE_TASK_COMPLEXITY | 28% | Expected multi-phase work |
| REPO_FRAGILITY | 16% | Frontend/build/auth issues |

## Prompt Sufficiency

High-sufficiency prompts (file targeting + acceptance criteria) achieve 95% completion vs 61% for low. Missing file targeting correlates strongest with replanning.

## Severity Triage (Top Sessions)

| Session | Score | Band | Best Intervention |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| S-42 | 65 | High | Session splitting |
| S-26 | 50 | Significant | Frontend preflight |
| S-15 | 44 | Significant | Deployment workflow |

## Friction Hotspots

- `backend/core/pipeline*.py` (highest revisions, repo fragility)
- `frontend/` build system (lowest completion rate)
- Auth/credential system (blocks E2E tests)
- Cloud/deployment (emerging high-severity hotspot)

## Non-Obvious Findings (top 4)

1. **Post-success expansion is improving** — recent sessions show much smaller scope deltas than early March.  
2. **File targeting > acceptance criteria** for preventing replans (3.7× effect).  
3. **Workflow-driven sessions are immune to scope creep** (100% clean).  
4. **Cloud/deployment is the new friction hotspot** (highest avg severity).

## Recommendations (top 3)

**1. Session Splitting** — Start new conversation after each phase. Expected: +10% first-shot rate.  
**2. Mandatory File Targeting** — Enforce in prompt optimizer.  
**3. Frontend Build Preflight** — Run `npm run build` early.

This sample shows the full forensic style: intent-aware severity, evidence-backed findings, and actionable triage.

Full reports are longer and include the complete per-conversation table + trends.
